Package org.apache.gravitino.dto.rel

Class SQLRepresentationDTO

java.lang.Object
org.apache.gravitino.dto.rel.RepresentationDTO
org.apache.gravitino.dto.rel.SQLRepresentationDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Representation
public final class SQLRepresentationDTO extends RepresentationDTO
A DTO mirroring SQLRepresentation. Represents a SQL-based view definition for a particular dialect.

    • type

      public String type()
      Description copied from interface: Representation
      Returns the representation type. The only supported value today is Representation.TYPE_SQL.
      Returns:
      The representation type identifier.
